stagingNotes: Official Cooper Hewitt current and upcoming exhibition pages only. The first slice stages the visible main exhibition blocks plus Learn more links, while sponsor-logo sections, donor/funding tails after the main exhibition copy, photo-credit blocks, previous/traveling/digital routes, and detail-page enrichment remain out of scope.
